code: import React from'react';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const steps=['Running AI Screening...','Analyzing Genetic Compatibility...','Running Quantum Simulation...'];const Loader=_ref=>{let{stage}=_ref;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"rounded-[28px] border border-slate-200 bg-white p-6 shadow-sm",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"flex items-center justify-between",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"text-sm font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.3em] text-sky-600",children:"Analysis in progress"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{className:"mt-3 text-xl font-semibold text-slate-900",children:"Preparing clinical recommendation"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"flex h-12 w-12 items-center justify-center rounded-3xl bg-sky-50 text-sky-600",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"text-lg font-semibold",children:stage+1})})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"mt-7 space-y-4",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"h-2 overflow-hidden rounded-full bg-slate-200",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"h-full rounded-full bg-gradient-to-r from-teal-500 to-sky-500 transition-all duration-500",style:{width:`${(stage+1)/steps.length*100}%`}})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"space-y-3",children:steps.map((label,index)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"flex items-center gap-3",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:`flex h-3 w-3 items-center justify-center rounded-full ${index<=stage?'bg-teal-500':'bg-slate-300'}`}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"text-sm text-slate-600",children:label})]},label))})]})]});};export default Loader;
